zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Hampden於1440年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Sir John Hampden43歲，母親Elizabeth Whalesborough38歲。她於1457年與Walter De Arden在英國瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Hampden于1440年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Sir John Hampden43岁，母亲Elizabeth Whalesborough38岁。她于1457年与Walter De Arden在英国瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Hampden was born in 1440, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John Hampden, was 43 and her mother, Elizabeth Whalesborough, was 38. She married Walter De Arden in 1457, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1525, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in Aston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Hampden est née en 1440, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hampden, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Whalesborough, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Walter De Arden en 1457, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Aston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Hampden 1440 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Hampden 43 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Whalesborough 38. Sie hat 1457 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England Walter De Arden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1525 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Aston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Hampden è nata il nel 1440 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Hampden, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Whalesborough, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Walter De Arden nel 1457, nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1525, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Aston, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Hampdenが1440年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Hampdenは43歳，母Elizabeth Whalesboroughは38歳であった。1457年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルでWalter De Ardenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Hampden(이)가 1440년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Hampden(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Whalesborough(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1457년 영국 워윅실르 박홀에서 Walter De Arden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 애스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Hampden nasceu em 1440, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hampden, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Whalesborough, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter De Arden em 1457, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1525, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Aston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Hampden родилась в 1440 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Hampden было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Whalesborough, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter De Arden в 1457 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1525 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности астон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Hampden nació en 1440, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hampden, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Whalesborough, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Walter De Arden en 1457, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1525, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Aston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
